title: ราคาน้ำมันวันนี้ 23 กรกฎาคม 2569 อัปเดตล่าสุด "เบนซิน-ดีเซล" ลิตรละกี่บาท
desc: อัปเดตราคาน้ำมันวันนี้ 23 กรกฎาคม 2569 เช็กราคาน้ำมันทุกชนิด กลุ่มเบนซิน, แก๊สโซฮอล์, ดีเซล จากปั๊มน้ำมัน ปตท., บางจาก, พีที, คาลเท็กซ์, ซัสโก้ และเชลล์ ล่าสุดราคาลิตรละกี่บาทแล้ว
title_cn: 2026年7月23日泰国汽油柴油油价最新行情
summary_cn: 泰国石油公司（PTT）、Shell、Bangchak等主要加油站的汽油、汽油混合、柴油等油品价格实时更新。油价浮动直接影响驾车成本，是在泰车主和居民日常生活的重要参考指标。
desc_original: อัปเดตราคาน้ำมันวันนี้ 23 กรกฎาคม 2569 เช็กราคาน้ำมันทุกชนิด กลุ่มเบนซิน, แก๊สโซฮอล์, ดีเซล จากปั๊มน้ำมัน ปตท., บางจาก, พีที, คาลเท็กซ์, ซัสโก้ และเชลล์ ล่าสุดราคาลิตรละกี่บาทแล้ว

title: ขายดิบขายดี ส่งมอบ GEELY EX2 กว่า 10,000 คัน ตอกย้ำความเชื่อมั่นลูกค้า
desc: ธนบุรีนอยสเติน ฉลองส่งมอบ GEELY EX2 กว่า 10,000 คัน ตอกย้ำความเชื่อมั่นลูกค้า พร้อมชูศักยภาพการเติบโตของ GEELY ในไทย
title_cn: 吉利EX2在泰销量突破万辆 市场信心持续高涨
summary_cn: 泰国吉利汽车经销商Thonburi Motors宣布完成EX2车型交付超10,000辆。这一成就充分说明Geely品牌在泰国消费者中的信任度，也反映出泰国新能源汽车市场的蓬勃发展势头。
desc_original: ธนบุรีนอยสเติน ฉลองส่งมอบ GEELY EX2 กว่า 10,000 คัน ตอกย้ำความเชื่อมั่นลูกค้า พร้อมชูศักยภาพการเติบโตของ GEELY ในไทย

title: “กอบศักดิ์” หนุนนายกฯเบรกแลนด์บริดจ์ เชียร์ผุด “ท่าเรือฝั่งตะวันตก”ส่งสินค้าไปอินเดีย-ยุโรป
desc: “กอบศักดิ์” ขานรับวิสัยทัศน์นายกฯ เบรกโปรเจกต์ยักษ์ “แลนด์บริดจ์” แนะโฟกัสสร้าง “ท่าเรือฝั่งตะวันตก” คาดอีก 3-4 ปี เครื่องยนต์เศรษฐกิจใหม่ดันจีดีพีไทยพุ่งแตะ 4.5%
title_cn: 泰国调整基建战略 西海港项目优先于陆桥计划
summary_cn: 泰国政策高层支持总理决定搁置「陆桥」超级项目，转而专注发展「西海港」。新港口将承载对印度及欧洲的货物运输，预计3至4年内成为新的经济增长引擎，推动泰国GDP增速达4.5%。这是泰国对外贸易战略的重大转向。
desc_original: “กอบศักดิ์” ขานรับวิสัยทัศน์นายกฯ เบรกโปรเจกต์ยักษ์ “แลนด์บริดจ์” แนะโฟกัสสร้าง “ท่าเรือฝั่งตะวันตก” คาดอีก 3-4 ปี เครื่องยนต์เศรษฐกิจใหม่ดันจีดีพีไทยพุ่งแตะ 4.5%

title: Agency prepares security guidelines for smart devices
desc: The National Cyber Security Agency (NCSA) is preparing the country to deal with emerging attacks involving smart devices, particularly CCTV systems and virtual power plants (VPPs) in the energy sector, while deeming data sovereignty a priority.
title_cn: 泰国启动智能设备网络安保指南制定工作
summary_cn: 泰国国家网络安全局（NCSA）正制定应对智能设备网络威胁的安全指南，重点针对闭路电视（CCTV）系统和能源领域的虚拟电力厂（VPP）等关键设施。数据主权保护被视为优先任务，对在泰企业和机构的信息安全保护意义重大。
desc_original: The National Cyber Security Agency (NCSA) is preparing the country to deal with emerging attacks involving smart devices, particularly CCTV systems and virtual power plants (VPPs) in the energy sector, while deeming data sovereignty a priority.

title: Thai air conditioner makers eye Europe
desc: The Trade Policy and Strategy Office (TPSO) is urging Thai air conditioner manufacturers to penetrate European markets as a record heatwave drives demand.
title_cn: 泰国空调制造商积极开拓欧洲市场
summary_cn: 泰国贸易政策与战略办公室鼓励本地空调生产企业进军欧洲市场，抓住欧洲创纪录热浪驱动的需求增长机遇。这一举措为泰国制造业创造新的出口增长点，充分利用全球气候变化带来的市场机会。
desc_original: The Trade Policy and Strategy Office (TPSO) is urging Thai air conditioner manufacturers to penetrate European markets as a record heatwave drives demand.

title: THAI sees aviation recovery in H2 despite fuel uptick
desc: The financial results of Thai Airways International (THAI) are expected to bottom out in the second quarter, while recently approved tourism stimulus efforts should help airlines in the second half even as renewed US-Iran tensions cause jet fuel prices to rise, say analysts.
title_cn: 泰国航空预期下半年恢复强劲增长，燃油成本上升有所拖累
summary_cn: 泰国国际航空公司（THAI）财务状况预计在第二季度触底。分析师认为政府近期批准的旅游刺激措施将支撑下半年航空业复苏，尽管美伊紧张局势导致喷气燃油价格上升。
desc_original: The financial results of Thai Airways International (THAI) are expected to bottom out in the second quarter, while recently approved tourism stimulus efforts should help airlines in the second half even as renewed US-Iran tensions cause jet fuel prices to rise, say analysts.

title: Yuan gains ground in Thai trade transactions
desc: Bank of Ayudhya (Krungsri) expects Thai importers to make greater use of Chinese yuan in international transactions, reflecting the growing volume of imports from China.
title_cn: 人民币在泰国贸易中的地位稳步提升
summary_cn: 泰国开泰银行（Krungsri）预计泰国进口商将在国际交易中增加人民币使用比例，这反映了泰国从中国进口商品数量的持续增长趋势。
desc_original: Bank of Ayudhya (Krungsri) expects Thai importers to make greater use of Chinese yuan in international transactions, reflecting the growing volume of imports from China.

title: "เอส" โตสวนตลาด ยอดขายครึ่งปีพุ่ง 11% ส่ง Shoot Salty Lemonade เจาะ Gen Z
desc: "เอส" เผยยอดขายครึ่งปีแรก 2569 เติบโต 11% หลังส่งเครื่องดื่มใหม่ Shoot Salty Lemonade และทำตลาดผ่านกีฬาบาสเกตบอล เจาะผู้บริโภค Gen Z ดันฐานลูกค้าวัย 15-29 ปีเพิ่มขึ้น
title_cn: 「S」饮料品牌逆势增长，上半年销售增长11%，新品瞄准Z世代市场
summary_cn: 泰国「S」饮料品牌上半年销售增长11%，通过推出新产品「Shoot Salty Lemonade」并借助篮球体育营销策略，成功扩大了15至29岁消费人群基数。
desc_original: "เอส" เผยยอดขายครึ่งปีแรก 2569 เติบโต 11% หลังส่งเครื่องดื่มใหม่ Shoot Salty Lemonade และทำตลาดผ่านกีฬาบาสเกตบอล เจาะผู้บริโภค Gen Z ดันฐานลูกค้าวัย 15-29 ปีเพิ่มขึ้น

title: Banker urges building up seaports
desc: A revised transport network that connects China to western Thailand via a new deep-sea port in Ranong could serve as a more viable alternative to the Land Bridge project, which is considered less feasible, says a banker.
title_cn: 金融人士呼吁强化海港基础设施建设
summary_cn: 一位银行家主张，在拉农府（Ranong）建设新的深海港口，连接中国与泰国西部的运输网络，可成为陆桥项目（Land Bridge）的更可行替代方案。
desc_original: A revised transport network that connects China to western Thailand via a new deep-sea port in Ranong could serve as a more viable alternative to the Land Bridge project, which is considered less feasible, says a banker.

title: Data silos stall growth
desc: Thailand's ambition to become a data-and-technology-driven economy faces structural hurdles, says a senior researcher at the Thailand Development Research Institute (TDRI).
title_cn: 数据孤岛困局拖累泰国发展步伐
summary_cn: 泰国发展研究所（TDRI）资深研究员指出，泰国成为数据与技术驱动型经济的目标面临结构性瓶颈，数据孤岛问题成为关键阻力。
desc_original: Thailand's ambition to become a data-and-technology-driven economy faces structural hurdles, says a senior researcher at the Thailand Development Research Institute (TDRI).

title: Chon Buri seeks regulatory reforms
desc: Chon Buri tourism operators are urging the Tourism and Sports Ministry to address persistent issues affecting the low season and safety, including unlicensed hotels, illegal tour operators and unregulated entertainment venues.
title_cn: 春武里旅游业呼吁加强规范监管
summary_cn: 春武里（Chon Buri）旅游业界向泰国旅游体育部提出改革建议，要求解决影响淡季经营和游客安全的长期问题。包括无牌照酒店、非法旅游经营者和不规范娱乐场所等违法行为。业界强调规范监管有利于提升旅游竞争力和游客满意度。
desc_original: Chon Buri tourism operators are urging the Tourism and Sports Ministry to address persistent issues affecting the low season and safety, including unlicensed hotels, illegal tour operators and unregulated entertainment venues.

title: PM orders tougher crime crackdown
desc: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered a tougher nationwide crackdown on crime, adding public safety is essential to economic growth.
title_cn: 总理下令全国加强打击犯罪行动
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）发布指示，在全国范围内加强打击犯罪的力度。总理强调公共安全是推动经济增长的基础，此举旨在改善泰国治安环境，保护居民和游客的人身安全。
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has ordered a tougher nationwide crackdown on crime, adding public safety is essential to economic growth.

title: อานิสงส์ "ไทยช่วยไทยพลัส”ดันดัชนีเอสเอ็มอีไตรมาส2พุ่ง-หนี้สินลดลง
desc: สสว. เผยดัชนี เอสเอ็มอีเดือน มิ.ย. ฟื้นตัว ในรอบ 4 เดือน แตะระดับ 47.8 อานิสงส์ โครงการ “ไทยช่วยไทยพลัส” ช่วยผลักดัน ส่วนสถานการณ์หนี้สินไตรมาส 2 เริ่มส่งสัญญาณผ่อนคลาย
title_cn: 「泰国帮助泰国Plus」计划推动小微企业指数上升，债务负担缓解
summary_cn: 泰国国家中小企业委员会公布数据，6月份小微企业指数环比回升至47.8点，创四个月新高。「泰国帮助泰国Plus」(Thai Help Thai Plus)政策项目的推动作用显著，有效支持本地中小企业恢复。同时第二季度企业债务负担开始呈现缓解迹象，经济前景趋好。
desc_original: สสว. เผยดัชนี เอสเอ็มอีเดือน มิ.ย. ฟื้นตัว ในรอบ 4 เดือน แตะระดับ 47.8 อานิสงส์ โครงการ “ไทยช่วยไทยพลัส” ช่วยผลักดัน ส่วนสถานการณ์หนี้สินไตรมาส 2 เริ่มส่งสัญญาณผ่อนคลาย

title: PM to press Myanmar on river pollution
desc: Thailand will hold talks with Myanmar leader Min Aung Hlaing next month on cross-border environmental and security issues, including toxic contamination in the Kok River, agricultural burning and narcotics production, Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said on Wednesday.
title_cn: 总理将与缅甸就河流污染等跨境问题进行谈判
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷宣布下月将与缅甸领导人敏昂莱（Min Aung Hlaing）举行高层会谈。双方将重点讨论高河（Kok River）有毒污染、农业焚烧和毒品生产等跨境环保与安全问题，旨在加强区域合作应对共同挑战。
desc_original: Thailand will hold talks with Myanmar leader Min Aung Hlaing next month on cross-border environmental and security issues, including toxic contamination in the Kok River, agricultural burning and narcotics production, Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul said on Wednesday.

title: Gold card health scheme to cover obesity surgery
desc: The National Health Security Office (NHSO) has expanded benefits under the Universal Coverage Scheme, commonly known as the 30-baht gold card scheme, to include surgery for patients with severe obesity who meet strict medical criteria.
title_cn: 金卡医保计划扩大保障范围，涵盖肥胖症手术治疗
summary_cn: 泰国国家卫生保障办公室（NHSO）已扩大30泰铢金卡医保（通用保障计划）的保障范围，新增符合严格医学标准的重度肥胖患者的手术治疗费用。此项政策调整进一步完善泰国全民医保制度，为患者提供更全面的医疗保障。
desc_original: The National Health Security Office (NHSO) has expanded benefits under the Universal Coverage Scheme, commonly known as the 30-baht gold card scheme, to include surgery for patients with severe obesity who meet strict medical criteria.

title: MFA has plans to evacuate Thais in the Middle East
desc: There are contingency evacuation plans in place for Thai citizens living in the Middle East amid a new round of the US-led war against Iran, said Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow.
title_cn: 泰国外交部启动中东侨民撤离预案
summary_cn: 美伊冲突升温背景下，泰国外交部宣布已制定应急撤离方案，准备在必要时撤离驻中东泰籍侨民。外交部长西哈萨克·皮安基特基奥表示相关预案已就位。
desc_original: There are contingency evacuation plans in place for Thai citizens living in the Middle East amid a new round of the US-led war against Iran, said Foreign Affairs Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow.

title: AIS lands exclusive Uefa broadcasting rights
desc: Advanced Info Service Plc (AIS) has secured exclusive broadcasting rights to Uefa's men's club competitions in Thailand under a four-year agreement with UC3.
title_cn: AIS 获得欧足联泰国独家转播权
summary_cn: 泰国大型电信公司 AIS（Advanced Info Service Plc）与 UC3 签署四年协议，获得欧足联（UEFA）男子俱乐部赛事在泰国的独家转播权。这是 AIS 体育转播业务的重要扩展。
desc_original: Advanced Info Service Plc (AIS) has secured exclusive broadcasting rights to Uefa's men's club competitions in Thailand under a four-year agreement with UC3.

title: Anutin vows to continue peace talks after bomb blast
desc: A car bomb explosion in Narathiwat has prompted a security investigation, with Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul pledging continued peace talks and stronger measures to prevent further attacks.
title_cn: 那拉提瓦汽车炸弹案后 总理承诺深化南部和平进程
summary_cn: 泰国南部那拉提瓦（Narathiwat）发生汽车炸弹爆炸事件，总理阿努廷·詹威拉库尔（Anutin Charnvirakul）随即表示将继续推进南部和平谈判，并加强安保措施防止类似袭击再发。
desc_original: A car bomb explosion in Narathiwat has prompted a security investigation, with Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul pledging continued peace talks and stronger measures to prevent further attacks.

title: PP attacks changes to welfare card terms
desc: The People's Party (PP) has criticised the government's revised state welfare card criteria, saying the changes reflect poor policy coordination and could exclude vulnerable people from assistance.
title_cn: 人民党抨击政府福利卡发放新规
summary_cn: 泰国人民党（People's Party）批评政府修订的国家福利卡发放标准，指出新政策协调不力，可能导致弱势群体被排斥在社会援助之外，影响贫困人口基本生活保障。
desc_original: The People's Party (PP) has criticised the government's revised state welfare card criteria, saying the changes reflect poor policy coordination and could exclude vulnerable people from assistance.

title: Drug tablets found inside kids' toys
desc: Authorities have intercepted an international parcel containing nearly 1,000 tablets of suspected 2C-B, a synthetic psychoactive drug classified as a Category 1 narcotic, concealed inside children's toys, officials said on Wednesday.
title_cn: 儿童玩具夹藏毒片被海关查获
summary_cn: 泰国当局在国际包裹中发现近千粒疑似 2C-B 毒品片剂，该物质被隐藏在儿童玩具内。2C-B 是合成致幻药物，属泰国一级管制毒品。此案涉及国际贩毒活动。
desc_original: Authorities have intercepted an international parcel containing nearly 1,000 tablets of suspected 2C-B, a synthetic psychoactive drug classified as a Category 1 narcotic, concealed inside children's toys, officials said on Wednesday.

title: Teacher seeks probe into hubby's death at hospital
desc: A teacher and social media influencer from Ratchaburi has petitioned health authorities and professional medical bodies to investigate the treatment her late husband received at a private hospital, alleging possible breaches of medical and nursing standards.
title_cn: 女教师要求调查丈夫在私立医院身亡事件
summary_cn: 拉差武里 Ratchaburi 的一名女教师兼社交媒体名人向泰国卫生部门和医学专业机构请愿，要求调查其已故丈夫在私立医院接受的诊疗情况，声称医疗和护理标准可能存在违规。
desc_original: A teacher and social media influencer from Ratchaburi has petitioned health authorities and professional medical bodies to investigate the treatment her late husband received at a private hospital, alleging possible breaches of medical and nursing standards.

title: ไต้หวันผิดหวัง รัฐบาลไทยเห็นพ้องถ้อยแถลง ไต้หวันเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของจีน
desc: กระทรวงต่างประเทศของไต้หวันแสดงความผิดหวังในรัฐบาลไทย หลังนายกรัฐมนตรี อนุทิน ชาญวีรกูล เดินทางเยือนจีนแล้วมีแถลงการณ์ร่วมออกมาระบุว่า ไทยยอมรับว่าไต้หวันเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของจีน
title_cn: 台湾对泰国政府涉台声明表示失望
summary_cn: 台湾外交部对泰国政府表示失望。泰国总理阿努廷 Anutin Charnvirakul 访华后，泰中发表联合声明，泰国表示承认台湾为中国的一部分。
desc_original: กระทรวงต่างประเทศของไต้หวันแสดงความผิดหวังในรัฐบาลไทย หลังนายกรัฐมนตรี อนุทิน ชาญวีรกูล เดินทางเยือนจีนแล้วมีแถลงการณ์ร่วมออกมาระบุว่า ไทยยอมรับว่าไต้หวันเป็นส่วนหนึ่งของจีน

title: Ajinomoto weighs price hikes amid cost pressures
desc: Ajinomoto (Thailand) Co, the producer of Ajinomoto seasoning and Birdy ready-to-drink coffee, says amid higher production costs it is not ruling out the possibility of raising product prices.
title_cn: 味之素泰国面临成本压力或将上调产品价格
summary_cn: 泰国味之素公司 Ajinomoto (Thailand) Co 生产的味之素调味料和 Birdy 即饮咖啡等产品因生产成本上升，公司不排除上调产品价格的可能。
desc_original: Ajinomoto (Thailand) Co, the producer of Ajinomoto seasoning and Birdy ready-to-drink coffee, says amid higher production costs it is not ruling out the possibility of raising product prices.

title: SME D Bank avoids lending slowdown
desc: SME Development Bank of Thailand (SME D Bank) has extended 40.9 billion baht in loans during the first half of the year, up 12.4% year-on-year.
title_cn: 泰国中小企业发展银行上半年贷款增长12.4%
summary_cn: 泰国中小企业发展银行 SME D Bank 上半年发放贷款409亿泰铢，同比增长12.4%，贷款业务增势良好未见放缓迹象。
desc_original: SME Development Bank of Thailand (SME D Bank) has extended 40.9 billion baht in loans during the first half of the year, up 12.4% year-on-year.

title: Five rangers killed in deep south attack
desc: NARATHIWAT - Five paramilitary rangers were killed and five civilians injured when a group of heavily armed men on a pickup truck attacked a security checkpoint in Rangae district of this southern border province on Wednesday night.
title_cn: 深南部检查站遭武装袭击 5名护林员丧生
summary_cn: 那拉提瓦府 (Narathiwat) 莱州 (Rangae) 区一处安全检查站在22日晚间遭到武装分子驾驶皮卡发动的突然袭击，事件造成5名准军事护林员当场丧生，另有5名平民和儿童受伤。此起事件再次反映泰南边境地区安全形势的严峻性。
desc_original: NARATHIWAT - Five paramilitary rangers were killed and five civilians injured when a group of heavily armed men on a pickup truck attacked a security checkpoint in Rangae district of this southern border province on Wednesday night.

title: Proxies buying Bangkok houses for ‘annoying’ Chinese occupants
desc: Police have found that a Chinese man used a Thai woman and her mother as proxies to set up companies that bought luxury houses in Bangkok for Chinese occupants who reportedly annoyed neighbours.
title_cn: 代理人为「令人讨厌」的中国住户购买曼谷豪宅
summary_cn: 警方查获一名中国男子利用泰国女性及其母亲作为代理人，设立公司购买曼谷豪宅供中国住户居住的违法案件。这些中国住户据报因生活习惯差异引起邻居严重不满。事件反映了外资进入泰国房产市场可能面临的法律规范问题，也引发了社会关于外国人房产购买政策的讨论。
desc_original: Police have found that a Chinese man used a Thai woman and her mother as proxies to set up companies that bought luxury houses in Bangkok for Chinese occupants who reportedly annoyed neighbours.

title: Samran Nualma named Thailand’s next police chief
desc: Pol Gen Samran Nualma has been selected unanimously as Thailand’s next national police chief, succeeding Pol Gen Kittharath Punpetch when he retires on Sept 30.
title_cn: 萨兰·努阿尔玛（Samran Nualma）任泰国新任警察总长
summary_cn: 泰国一致同意任命警官萨兰·努阿尔玛为新任警察总长，将于9月30日正式接任，接替即将退休的基塔拉特·普恩佩特（Kittharath Punpetch）。这是泰国警察领导层的重要人事调整，新总长将掌舵警方的运营和改革工作，对国内安全和执法产生重要影响。
desc_original: Pol Gen Samran Nualma has been selected unanimously as Thailand’s next national police chief, succeeding Pol Gen Kittharath Punpetch when he retires on Sept 30.

title: Airport Rail Link delays stretch into evening
desc: Services on the Airport Rail Link that connects Suvarnabhumi airport and inner Bangkok were still reduced to one train per hour on Wednesday evening after a derailment at the Khlong Tan depot.
title_cn: 素万那普机场快线延误至傍晚
summary_cn: 苏万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）至曼谷市中心的机场快线（Airport Rail Link）周三傍晚因隆谷站（Khlong Tan）车辆段脱轨事故而服务受阻，班次减为每小时一列车，影响乘客出行。
desc_original: Services on the Airport Rail Link that connects Suvarnabhumi airport and inner Bangkok were still reduced to one train per hour on Wednesday evening after a derailment at the Khlong Tan depot.

title: 泰国艺人Lisa世界杯期间吸金900万英镑，商业价值再创新高
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 据英国《太阳报》统计，本届世界杯期间的商业收入数据显示，BLACKPINK成员Lisa预计吸金约900万英镑。这位来自泰国武里南府的国际巨星，凭借与多家瞄准主流体育受众的全球顶级赞助商签署的高额代言合约，以及世界杯相关庆典活动的演出，在赛事期间收获丰厚商业回报。 品牌分析人士指出，Lisa和BLACKPINK将全球最忠诚、最具消费力的粉丝群体之一带入了足球世界。专家认为，世界杯不仅进一步放大了Lisa本就极高的国际影响力，也让她成功触达主流体育观众，使其在国际品牌眼中的商业价值再度攀升。 6月12日，Lisa在美国洛杉矶SoFi体育场举行的世界杯开幕式上担任压轴表演嘉宾，与巴西歌手Anitta及尼日利亚歌手Rema共同演唱世界杯官方主题曲《Goals》。这一演出让她成为历史上首位登上世界杯开幕式舞台的韩国流行音乐女艺人，让一位泰国女性站上了全球规模最大的体育盛会最耀眼的舞台。 在场外商业收入方面，据《太阳报》统计，仅有一人的收入高于Lisa——英格兰传奇球星大卫·贝克汉姆。贝克汉姆凭借为麦当劳、时代啤酒、美国银行和阿迪达斯等品牌拍摄广告，预计收入高达1900万英镑。这一数字甚至超过了英格兰国家队全体球员及教练组因打入世界杯四强所共享的1100万英镑奖金池。 此外，不少名人也借世界杯获得可观商业收益，例如金·卡戴珊凭借黄金广告时段获利，苏珊·博伊尔则因拍摄Irn-Bru汽水的幽默广告而受到关注。 值得一提的是，在世界杯决赛历史上首次举办的中场秀中，担任表演嘉宾的艺人据称并未获得任何演出报酬。麦当娜、夏奇拉和韩国男团BTS在酷玩乐队主唱克里斯·马丁策划的11分钟演出中义务登台。他们将自己的演出时间捐赠给国际公益组织Global Citizen与国际足联联合发起的公益项目，用于支持全球儿童教育以及足球普及事业。 （编译：Wan；来源：Thaiger） The post 泰国艺人Lisa世界杯期间吸金900万英镑，商业价值再创新高 appeared first on 泰国头条新闻 .

title: Mother urges better emergency response in school after son’s collapse
desc: Mother urges better emergency response in school after son’s collapse Legacy A mother in Pathum Thani is calling for stronger emergency response procedures and safety in schools after her 10 year old son suffered cardiac arrest on campus and was left with severe brain damage . The incident occurred at a school in Lam Luk Ka district at about 8am on July 8. The boy’s mother, 33 year old Lalitphat, shared her family’s experience on Facebook, saying she hoped it would encourage schools across Thailand to improve emergency preparedness and student safety. According to Lalitphat, the school contacted her that morning to say her son was experiencing a headache along with neck and stomach pain. She said it took her about 20 minutes to reach the school. When she arrived, she found her son unconscious in the school ‘s nursing room. She said his skin had turned dark, prompting further concern. Photo via Channel 7 The boy was first taken to a hospital opposite the school before being transferred to Siriraj Hospital for specialist treatment. title_cn: 母亲呼吁改进学校应急措施，儿子心脏停跳致脑损伤
summary_cn: 泰国巴吐姆他尼府林查县一名10岁男孩在校突发心脏停跳，因紧急响应延迟导致严重脑损伤。患儿心脏停跳超过10分钟，被送往诗里拉杰医院救治。母亲通过社交媒体分享经历，呼吁全泰国学校加强应急准备和学生安全措施，防止类似悲剧再次发生。

title: 承认”陈旧老气”后，泰国要靠什么重新吸引中国游客？
desc: 泰国头条新闻社讯 7月22日，据泰媒报道，泰国国家旅游局正联合7家中国私营企业，全面推动中国游客赴泰旅游市场，力争在2027年实现530万人次游客目标，预计创造收入近3000亿泰铢。 7月16日至20日，泰国总理阿努廷对中国上海、成都和北京进行正式访问。此次访问的重要议题之一，便是恢复中国游客信心、拓展市场机会，以及加强两国间的交通互联互通。 泰国国家旅游局局长塔佩妮表示，7月18日在成都，泰国政府与私营部门共同商讨了促进泰中旅游与出行合作的方针。在与四川航空的会谈中，双方重点商讨了恢复中国西部重要城市飞往泰国航班的计划，包括恢复成都至甲米、清莱和清迈的航线，以及开通直飞华欣和乌达抛的新航线。此外，双方还希望拓展重庆、西安和兰州等新兴市场需求。 塔佩妮指出，中国西部许多城市均为潜力巨大的高增长地区，加之泰国游客历来喜爱前往成都和重庆旅游，这正是拓展中国游客赴泰市场基础的良机。四川航空管理层希望泰国政府部门共同开展联合促销，或像此前”Thailand Summer Blast”项目那样直接向航空公司提供资金支持，促进包机航班和定期航班的营销推广。 对此，泰国国家旅游局透露，在7月15日举行的旅游领域政企联席委员会会议上，旅游与体育部长素拉萨会后表示，将通过三大主要项目推动泰国旅游发展。其中重要的一项为”Thailand Air Connect: Connecting The World to Amazing Thailand”项目，旨在支持来自国外的商业包机航班和定期航班。泰国旅游局将继续重点吸引中国包机航班，同时更加开放地支持欧洲等其他国家定期航班的运营。 在与中国领先的数字生活平台美团的会谈中，双方着力延伸营销合作，向优质游客群体宣传泰国，拓展来自主要城市和次级城市的游客基础。双方将运用数据和数字技术提升深度营销效率，优化中国游客出行体验。塔佩妮表示，与美团商讨的重点在于提升旅游战略合作，通过数据交换支持市场分析，在推动双向旅游理念下制作泰国国家推广计划，并通过黑珍珠餐厅指南推动泰国成为世界级美食旅游目的地，同时推进”Trusted Thailand”项目，以建立信心、吸引中国优质游客。 7月19日在北京，泰国国家旅游局与中国5家顶尖企业共同签署了意向书。这5家企业分别为：中国旅游集团、众信旅游集团、中国康辉旅游集团、高德地图和TCP红牛。合作旨在通过中国数字平台宣传”Amazing Thailand”品牌，开发高品质旅游线路，促进高价值旅游。同时，双方将运用”智慧旅游”数据和技术进行深度营销，增强品质与安全信心，吸引中国优质及高端游客群体，提升泰国作为国际级优质旅游胜地的形象。 泰国国家旅游局亚洲及南太平洋国际市场副局长帕塔拉阿侬·纳·
title_cn: 泰国与7家中资企业联手推进中国游客赴泰市场
summary_cn: 泰国国家旅游局与7家中国私企联合推动赴泰旅游市场，目标2027年吸引530万人次游客。总理阿努廷访华期间与美团、四川航空等企业商谈恢复西部城市航线和数字营销合作。泰国将通过Thailand Air Connect项目支持国际包机，与中国企业合作开发高品质旅游线路和美食旅游体验，建立「Trusted Thailand」品牌，预计创造近3000亿泰铢收入。

title: 5 things to do in Bangkok this weekend (July 24 to 26)
desc: 5 things to do in Bangkok this weekend (July 24 to 26) Legacy Bangkok feels fairly easy to enjoy this weekend if you do not want to rush it. You can step into a full-scale anime pop-up at ICONSIAM, browse pre-loved luxury finds at centralwOrld, drift through an exhibition at JWD Art Space, catch a free live music afternoon at BACC, or head to River City for something a little more reflective. It is the kind of weekend that works best when you leave a bit of room for wandering. title: Phuket money exchange theft suspect disguises himself as foreigner
desc: Phuket money exchange theft suspect disguises himself as foreigner Legacy A thief, who may have been posing as a foreigner , remains at large after stealing more than 600,000 baht from a currency exchange shop inside a shopping mall in Phuket on Sunday, July 19. The owner of the exchange business in Phuket reported the theft to Wichit Police Station after an employee discovered the incident at about 9.30am on July 20. Staff arrived at the shop and found the safe open, with cash in several currencies missing . CCTV footage showed the theft occurred between 9.13pm and 9.15pm on July 19, shortly before both the shop and the shopping centre closed. Staff initially believed the suspect was a foreign man. The CCTV footage showed a person wearing a black jacket with white stripes, black shorts, a dark blue cap, glasses and a moustache. The suspect also appeared to be wearing rubber gloves. Photo via Facebook/ Phuketandamannews Investigators said the suspect moved directly to the safe without hesitation, suggesting prior knowledge of the shop’s layout. summary_cn: 普吉岛一家购物商城内的货币兑换店于7月19日夜间遭盗，失窃金额627083泰铢，包括人民币175050元、欧元50张、俄罗斯卢布50000张、美元11700及瑞士法郎1000张。监控显示盗贼于晚9时13分至9时15分作案，嫌疑人穿黑白条纹夹克、黑短裤、深蓝棒球帽，戴眼镜和胡须，可能伪装成外国人。警方认为其对店铺布局熟悉。
desc_original: Phuket money exchange theft suspect disguises himself as foreigner Legacy A thief, who may have been posing as a foreigner , remains at large after stealing more than 600,000 baht from a currency exchange shop inside a shopping mall in Phuket on Sunday, July 19. The owner of the exchange business in Phuket reported the theft to Wichit Police Station after an employee discovered the incident at about 9.30am on July 20. Staff arrived at the shop and found the safe open, with cash in several currencies missing . CCTV footage showed the theft occurred between 9.13pm and 9.15pm on July 19, shortly before both the shop and the shopping centre closed. Staff initially believed the suspect was a foreign man. The CCTV footage showed a person wearing a black jacket with white stripes, black shorts, a dark blue cap, glasses and a moustache. The suspect also appeared to be wearing rubber gloves. Photo via Facebook/ Phuketandamannews Investigators said the suspect moved directly to the safe without hesitation, suggesting prior knowledge of the shop’s layout. Police said the stolen money totalled 627,083 baht, including 175,050 baht, 50 euros, 50,000 Russian rubles, US$11,700 and 1,000 Swis

title: PTT named Thailand’s most valuable brand in global study
desc: PTT named Thailand’s most valuable brand in global study Legacy PTT has been identified as Thailand’s most valuable brand, with a brand value of US$9.2 billion (approximately 326 billion baht), according to a global study published in June 2026 by OnDeck, a US-based online business lender. The study used valuations from two leading brand consultancies, Brand Finance and Interbrand, to calculate average brand values across their respective Global Top 100 rankings. Where both consultancies had available figures, the study averaged them. Where only one had data, that figure was used alone. Data is correct as of February 2026. PTT’s US$9.2 billion valuation places it in the oil and gas category alongside regional peer PETRONAS of Malaysia at US$14.4 billion and global names including Saudi Arabia’s Aramco at US$41.7 billion and the UK’s Shell at US$45.4 billion, the latter of which ranks 29th among the world’s 50 most valuable brands overall. Where PTT sits in the global picture The study’s global top five by brand value are dominated by American technology companies: Apple at US$522.7 billion, Microsoft at US$424.8 billion, Google at US$365 bi

title: Social media divided after chabad centre leader supports Patong hospital
desc: Social media divided after chabad centre leader supports Patong hospital Legacy The religious leader and co-director of the Chabad-Lubavitch Centre in Phuket donated 1.1 million baht to Patong Hospital , generating mixed reactions on Thai social media. Patong Hospital announced the donation on its official Facebook page on July 16, thanking Rabbi Sholom Dovber Glitzenstein, co-director of the Chabad-Lubavitch Centre in Phuket, and the organisation for contributing 1.1 million baht to the hospital. Photographs shared by the hospital showed deputy director Hathairat Rangsalit receiving the donation on behalf of the medical facility during a presentation ceremony. The post attracted significantly more engagement than the hospital’s usual Facebook updates, receiving more than 6,000 reactions and 3,000 comments. title: Cambodian man alleges 8,000 baht extortion attempt by Thai police
desc: Cambodian man alleges 8,000 baht extortion attempt by Thai police Legacy A Cambodian factory worker has accused two police officers in Samut Prakan of trying to extort 8,000 baht after he failed a breathalyser test on July 20, claiming they threatened to prosecute and deport him if he refused to pay. The worker, identified only as 44 year old Rat, is employed at a factory in Phraek Sa subdistrict. Today, July 22, he showed reporters banking records, including withdrawal transactions and his remaining account balance, while recounting what had happened. Rat said he met friends for dinner at a restaurant off Phraek Sa Road at around 10pm on July 20, where he drank almost two bottles of beer. While riding his motorcycle back to his accommodation, he said two patrol officers stopped him near a market. According to Rat, one of the men appeared to be a police volunteer . Rat said both searched him and asked whether he had consumed alcohol or used drugs. After admitting he had been drinking, Rat said one of the officers rode his motorcycle and took him to Mueang Samut Prakan Police Station for a breathalyser test . Photo via Amarin TV The test reportedly recorded an alcohol level of 60 mi
title_cn: 柬埔寨籍工人指控沙没巴旺府警察敲诈8000泰铢
summary_cn: 一名44岁柬埔寨籍工厂工人指控，7月20日晚他在沙没巴旺府被警察拦下，因酒精检测不合格，两名警官（其中可能为警务志愿者）威胁若不支付8000泰铢将对其起诉并遣返。工人随后向媒体出示银行交易记录作为证据。此事反映警察权力滥用及对外籍劳工的潜在歧视问题。
